name: VERU INC.
summary: Veru Inc. is a late clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel medicines for cardiometabolic and inflammatory diseases. Its pipeline includes enobosarm, an oral selective androgen receptor modulator (SARM) being developed to enhance GLP-1 RA weight loss by preserving lean mass and reducing fat, and sabizabulin, a microtubule disruptor for atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease inflammation. On December 30, 2024, Veru sold its FDA-approved FC2 Female Condom commercial product.

products.name: Enobosarm
products.description: Oral selective androgen receptor modulator (SARM) in development to augment fat loss and preserve lean mass in patients receiving GLP-1 RA therapy for obesity.

products.name: Sabizabulin
products.description: Microtubule disruptor in late-stage development for treating inflammation in atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease to reduce major cardiovascular events.

products.name: FC2 Female Condom (Internal Condom)
products.description: FDA-approved commercial product providing dual protection; sold by Veru on December 30, 2024.
